name: progressive_congestion
success_criteria: Alert at least 5 minutes before utilization exceeds 85 percent.

name: bgp_route_flap
success_criteria: Alert after repeated flap precursor events and before downstream impact.

name: mpls_tunnel_degradation
success_criteria: Detect rising loss and jitter before service disruption severity turns critical.

name: controller_policy_drift
success_criteria: Surface config-risk evidence and recommended rollback actions.
